title: BlueWave Tech and Janus Networks Share Director Sarah Mitchell
body: Sarah Mitchell, a long-time independent director, sits on the boards of both BlueWave Tech, a US software firm, and Janus Networks, a US telecommunications provider. The dual appointments were noted in BlueWave's most recent proxy statement. Mitchell, who has been described as a 'governance specialist', is also the chair of BlueWave's audit committee. Neither firm has any known sanctions or adverse-media flags.
